notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: With Jo Adell batting, Jose Siri picked off and caught stealing 2nd base, second baseman Zach McKinstry.

notableEvents.label: Oswald Peraza pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Oswald Peraza flies out sharply to left fielder Riley Greene.

notableEvents.label: Matt Vierling GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Matt Vierling grounds into a double play, shortstop Zach Neto to second baseman Oswald Peraza to first baseman Vaughn Grissom. Zach McKinstry out at 2nd. Matt Vierling out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Gage Workman pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Gage Workman flies out to left fielder Jose Siri.
